articles.title: Gold drops as oil and dollar rise on renewed US-Iran hostilities
articles.description: Gold fell more than 1% on Wednesday to hit an 11-week low, as the dollar and oil prices rose on renewed hostilities between the United States and Iran, fuelling concerns about inflation and interest...

articles.title: GIFT Nifty down, signals weak start for Sensex, Nifty as Middle East tensions flare again, crude oil rises
articles.description: GIFT Nifty traded lower on Wednesday morning, signalling that Sensex and Nifty set to open lower amid US-Iran tensions, while rising oil prices and FII selling add to market volatility. Asian markets and Wall Street also declined on renewed tensions.

articles.title: Indonesia's non-subsidised RON92 petrol price jumps 32%, first hike in months
articles.description: JAKARTA: Indonesia's non-subsidised Pertamax RON92 petrol has risen by about 32 per cent to Rp16,250 (US$0.90) per litre from Rp12,300, effective Wednesday (June 10), marking its first price increase in months.
